culprit_explanation: Steve had been secretly dumping industrial waste into the river for years, hiding it behind his role as a community volunteer. Lab analysis of the pollutants matched chemicals used exclusively at his facility.

characters.name: Steve
characters.description: Steve has managed the riverside processing plant for over a decade. He's well-liked in the community and sponsors the local football team — but his books don't add up.
characters.suspicious_detail: His plant's waste disposal logs have unexplained gaps every third month — exactly when pollution spikes were recorded downstream.

characters.name: Tung Tung Tung Sahur
characters.description: Tung oversees operations after hours and has almost unrestricted site access. He's been at the plant for two years but keeps to himself.
characters.suspicious_detail: Multiple colleagues report seeing his van parked near the drainage outflow at 3am on several occasions last autumn.
